originalTitle: Battlefield 6 Season 4 Naval Official Gameplay Trailer
content: Naval warfare has arrived, bringing all-out combat across land, air, and sea. Deploy to Tsuru Reef, our biggest battlefield yet, where sprawling islands, dynamic waves, boats, jets, helicopters, and ground vehicles collide in massive battles. Command the coastline with the RCB-90 Patrol Boat or race through the surf in the 7.7m NSW RHIB. Expand your arsenal with four new weapons, including the long-range Interdictor sniper rifle, then climb the ranks in a brand-new Ranked Battle Royale season packed with fresh rewards. And later in the season, Wake Island returns. Prepare to deploy when Season 4 launches on July 21. #Battlefield6
chineseContent: 海战已经到来，陆、空、海全面作战。部署到鹤礁，这是我们迄今为止最大的战场，在那里，广阔的岛屿、动态的波浪、船只、喷气式飞机、直升机和地面车辆在大规模战斗中相互碰撞。驾驶 RCB-90 巡逻艇指挥海岸线，或驾驶 7.7m NSW RHIB 在海浪中竞速。使用四种新武器扩展您的武器库，包括远程拦截狙击步枪，然后在充满新鲜奖励的全新排名大逃杀赛季中提升排名。在赛季后期，威克岛回归。准备在 7 月 21 日第 4 季推出时部署。#Battlefield6
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
